description_long: This is a two-tiered industrial-style shelving unit with a lower cabinet section. The frame is constructed from black metal, featuring vertical supports with circular cutouts and cross-bracing at the back for added stability. The shelves and cabinet doors are made from light-colored wood, giving a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The lower section consists of a double-door cabinet with black handles, while the upper section is an open shelf. The sides of the lower section include a metal mesh panel, adding both ventilation and a rugged aesthetic. This piece is suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban interiors where both storage and display are needed.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style shelving unit with a light wood cabinet and open shelf, supported by a black metal frame and mesh side panels. Features double doors with handles and cross-bracing for stability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double-door cabinet with black handles, open shelf above, and the full width of the unit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves, the metal mesh panel on the lower section, and the thickness of the wooden surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black metal cross-bracing and the back of the cabinet doors, as well as the mesh panel detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the mesh panel and the layered construction of the shelves.
